description:
Usually, the employees of Spirytus work as torturers, but just for tonight... they transform into princes?! The four go to work at NOX, a host club that Hera is on friendly terms with and where Sero used to work. Then, on a different day, Siu and the others try some of a mysterious canned drink and their appearances transform into that of children causing a huge panic!
Source: Crunchyroll
